title: AI Sherpa release manifest
description: Machine-readable description of what a release contains. Emitted by the weekly release Action as releases/<version>.json AND attached to the GitHub Release as a manifest.json asset. Consumed by the Atom-feed-to-email bridge, by setup --update --pin (rollback decisions), and by the analyzer for change-correlation. See docs/superpowers/2026-05-30-program-v2.md §5.3.

version.description: CalVer release tag. -rollback-N suffix when this release is itself a rollback.

released_at.description: ISO-8601. The moment the GitHub Release was published, not the moment the cron fired.

released_by.description: Identifier of the release Action workflow run. e.g. 'release.yml#42'.

previous_version.description: The tag this release follows. Used by --update to compute cumulative change summary since the user's last seen version.

rollback_to.description: If set, this release is a rollback restoring the state of the named version. Setup --update prefers rollback releases when --pin is not specified.

domains_touched.description: Domains whose CLAUDE.md, plugins, or skills changed in this release. Must be values from schemas/label_taxonomy.yml namespaces.domain.values.

domain.description: Optional. The domain this change targets, if scoped to one.

issue_numbers.description: Issues closed by this PR (Closes #N). Used to trace release → original feedback Issue.

release_note.description: Single-line summary suitable for email digest. Extracted from PR body or release-note label content.

checksum.description: Optional. SHA-256 of the tar of repo contents at this tag. Lets setup --update verify it pulled the right artifact.

$comment: v1 of this schema. To bump: add a $comment migration note here and ensure tools/validate-schemas script reads schema_version before applying validation.
